perspectives.description: The editor of the fashion magazine who is responsible for the content and direction of the publication. They face pressure to diversify model selection while considering potential impacts on sales.

A model from a minority background who has been overlooked in previous selections and is directly affected by the magazine's decision on diversity. Their career opportunities and representation in media are at stake.
A potential reader of the magazine who values diversity and representation in fashion media. Their interest in the magazine may be influenced by its inclusivity, affecting future readership.
